characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion. She has short, neatly styled brown hair and subtle makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Grey v-neck sweater over a pink undershirt.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: English बोलते वक़्त hesitation होती है? Words मुँह में ही अटक जाते हैं? [Hesitation while speaking English? Words get stuck in your mouth?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a relatable pain point: hesitation and fumbling while speaking English.
- Uses the extreme close-up visual to emphasize the physical act of speaking and feeling stuck.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English बोलते वक़्त hesitation होती है? Words मुँह में ही अटक जाते हैं?

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: जैसे interview में 'career' बोलना हो। सही pronunciation और confidence दोनों ज़रूरी हैं। [Like saying 'career' in an interview. Correct pronunciation and confidence are both important.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces a specific, high-stakes real-world example (an interview) that resonates with the target audience.
- Shifts the focus from abstract native accents to practical confidence and clarity.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: जैसे interview में 'career' बोलना हो। Supernova App. Practice My Text. Let's begin! Record yourself saying the word below. career. Tap to Speak. सही pronunciation और confidence दोनों ज़रूरी हैं।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: वरना 'career' का 'carrier' बन जाता है, और impression ख़राब। [Otherwise 'career' becomes 'carrier', and the impression is ruined.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the negative consequence of incorrect pronunciation in a relatable, everyday Hinglish example.
- Maintains a light, non-judgmental tone while pointing out a common mistake.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: वरना 'career' का 'carrier' बन जाता है। Let's compare my recording to yours. 56% career. You said it closer to the second version. और impression ख़राब। 98% career. Awesome! You got it this time!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अगर बिना डरे practice करनी है, तो Supernova app try करो। आप बोलते हो, और AI tutor सुनकर तुरंत आपकी गलतियां सुधारता है। [If you want to practice without fear, try the Supernova app. You speak, and the AI tutor listens and instantly corrects your mistakes.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the safe, judgment-free solution for practice.
- Explains the core AI tutor feature clearly and simply, emphasizing instant feedback.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अगर बिना डरे practice करनी है, तो Supernova app try करो। आप बोलते हो, और AI tutor सुनकर तुरंत आपकी गलतियां सुधारता है।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसमें आपको daily lessons मिलते हैं, और आप real-life situations जैसे office या shopping के लिए practice कर सकते हो। वो भी अपनी भाषा में! [In this you get daily lessons, and you can practice for real-life situations like office or shopping. That too in your own language!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights practical features like daily lessons and real-life scenario practice (office, shopping).
- Emphasizes the comfort of learning through the user's native language, reinforcing the brand's core value.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: इसमें आपको daily lessons मिलते हैं, और आप real-life situations जैसे office या shopping के लिए practice कर सकते हो। वो भी अपनी भाषा में!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: आज ही Supernova download करो और बोलना शुरू करो! [Download Supernova today and start speaking!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action.
- Ends on a high-energy, positive note, acting like a supportive older sibling.
